title: Memorial Rose Bowl Graveside Flower Vase with Diamanté and 3D Flowers (In Loving Memory)
features: This memorial graveside rose bowl serves as a poignant tribute to cherished loved ones, designed specifically for placement at gravesides, cemeteries, or memorials.
The rose bowl is adorned with intricately designed 3D flowers and diamanté detail that add a touch of artistry and sophistication.
The engraved inscription, "Special Dad, Never more than a thought away, loved and remembered every day" resonates deeply with sentiments of remembrance and affection.
Made from durable materials, it is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining its aesthetic appeal, making it a lasting tribute that can be cherished for years to come.

Measuring 15.5cm in height, 12.5cm in width, and 12cm in depth, this thoughtfully crafted piece is not only a beautiful home for your favourite blooms but also a meaningful decorative item that can enhance any space.
Each flower pot comes beautifully boxed, making it an ideal gift for those seeking to honour the memory of a loved one or simply to add a heartfelt touch to their home décor.
